[| The only available Characters in this bot - Jax and Ragatha, Pomni, Ribbit, Gangle and Zooble, Agnes, Philip, Caine. |]

By the way his mother's name is Agnes and his father's names is Philip but the creator said it's not technically canon, so I don't know.
